zh.lifeSummary: 當Joseph Ruggles Sr於1701年1月30日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德素費爾德時，他的父親Benjamin Ruggles24歲，母親Mercy Woodbridge28歲。他於1722年11月15日與Rachel Tolles在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他於1790年住在美國康乃狄克州利其費爾德劍橋大學默里 米爾福德。他去世於1791年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德紐波利享年90歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州費艾費爾德費艾費爾德費艾費爾德 易亞斯特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joseph Ruggles Sr于1701年1月30日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德素費爾德时，他的父亲Benjamin Ruggles24岁，母亲Mercy Woodbridge28岁。他于1722年11月15日与Rachel Tolles在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他于1790年住在美国康涅狄格州利其費爾德劍橋大學默里 米爾福德。他去世于1791年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德紐波利享年90岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州費艾費爾德費艾費爾德費艾費爾德 易亞斯特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Ruggles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Essex): variant of the now extinct surname Ruggle, with post-medieval excrescent -s. The origin of Ruggle is uncertain. It could be a variant of the Suffolk and Essex name Ricold with voicing of /k/ to /g/ and the same vowel change as seen in Smoothy for Smithey (another Suffolk and Essex name) and in Puckering for Pickering .
History: The founder of this influential American family was Thomas Ruggles (1584–1644) of Sudbury, Suffolk, England, who settled in Roxbury, MA, in 1637.

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Joseph Ruggles Sr was born on 30 January 1701, in Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Benjamin Ruggles, was 24 and his mother, Mercy Woodbridge, was 28. He married Rachel Tolles on 15 November 1722, in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. He lived in New Milford, Litchfield, Connecticut, United States in 1790. He died in 1791, in Newbury, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 90, and was buried in Fairfield East Cemetery, Fairfield, Fairfield, Connecticut, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: Joseph Ruggles Srが1701年1月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードスフィールドで生まれた時，父Benjamin Rugglesは24歳，母Mercy Woodbridgeは28歳であった。1722年11月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンでRachel Tollesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1790年にはアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州リトチフィールドニュー ミルフォードに住んでいた。彼は1791年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドニューブリーで90歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ファイルフィールドファイルフィールドファイルフィールド エアスト セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joseph Ruggles Sr(이)가 1701년 1월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 수필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Benjamin Ruggles(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mercy Woodbridge(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1722년 11월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐에서 Rachel Tolles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 1790년도에 미국 코네티컷 주 리트ch필드 뉴 미퍼드에서 살았다. 그는 1791년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 뉴버이에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 파어필드 파어필드 파어필드 이스트 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Ruggles Sr nasceu em 30 de janeiro de 1701, em Suffield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Benjamin Ruggles, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mercy Woodbridge, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Rachel Tolles em 15 de novembro de 1722, em New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele viveu em New Milford, Litchfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América em 1790. Ele faleceu em 1791, em Newbury, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Fairfield East Cemetery, Fairfield, Fairfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joseph Ruggles Sr родился 30 января 1701 г. в местности суффиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Benjamin Ruggles было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mercy Woodbridge, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Rachel Tolles 15 ноября 1722 г. в местности ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он жил в местности ню милфорд, личфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в 1790 году. Он умер в 1791 г. в местности нюбури, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности феирфиелд эаст кеметири, феирфиелд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joseph Ruggles Sr nació el 30 de enero de 1701, en Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Benjamin Ruggles, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mercy Woodbridge, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Rachel Tolles el 15 de noviembre de 1722, en New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Vivió en New Milford, Litchfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos en 1790. Murió en 1791, en Newbury, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Fairfield East Cemetery, Fairfield, Fairfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
